struct InboxPage: View {

    var body: some View {
        switch inboxUI.state {
        case .loading:
            ProgressView("Loading...")
        case .loaded(let cards) where cards.isEmpty:
            Text("No messages")
        case .loaded(let cards):
            ScrollView {
